hooks.command: bash -c 'git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; git remote get-url origin >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; [ -z "$(git ls-files -u)" ] || exit 0; git add -A >/dev/null 2>&1; git diff --staged --quiet && exit 0; git commit -m "auto-sync: $(date +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")" >/dev/null 2>&1; git push --quiet >/dev/null 2>&1; true'
